response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 10+ years of experience, current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Solid background in React, TypeScript, MongoDB, Docker, and testing practices (TDD). Some gaps around Nest.js, PostgreSQL, and Kotlin/Java is dated, but the breadth of experience and craftsmanship focus compensate well.
strengths: Direct experience with AI agents and MCP frameworks at current re:cinq role
Deep full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB exceeding 6+ year requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin/Java experience appears limited and dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
Heavy use of DLang in past roles may indicate niche preferences over mainstream enterprise stacks
